overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing an FBI agent exploring a rainy small town. The character walks through wet streets, past a lodge and waterfront area, through narrow alleys, and finally meets colleagues at a diner entrance. Atmospheric overcast lighting with misty mountains in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down wet asphalt street toward intersection with lodge sign

entered.detail: red brick industrial building with garage doors and signage
vintage yellow pickup truck parked on street
large white cylindrical silos with red deer logo
wooden lodge building with green Elderwood signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet small-town street with an FBI agent walking toward an intersection. A yellow pickup truck is parked on the right, while white silos and a wooden lodge building appear in the distance. The atmosphere is misty and overcast.

American flag mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The agent turns right onto a sidewalk beside a historic brick building adorned with American flags. A pedestrian stands near the entrance on a phone call. The Elderwood Lodge sign remains visible in the background to the left.

events.description: passes under large green Deer Fest banner being hung by two workers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a waterfront promenade with metal railings and wooden deer statues in the distance. Two workers are hanging a large green Deer Fest banner across the path, one on a ladder and one on the ground. Misty mountains are visible across the water.

events.description: turns left into narrow alley with boarded windows and brick walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley with boarded-up windows and utility poles

entered.detail: windows covered with plywood boards on brick building
wooden telephone poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The agent turns left into a narrow alleyway lined with boarded-up storefronts. The space is enclosed with brick walls on one side and utility poles lining the path. The waterfront and festival decorations disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with dumpsters and debris

events.description: encounters man in dark suit walking in opposite direction through alley

red industrial dumpster against white wall
white sport utility vehicle parked at alley exit

segments.scene_description: The agent proceeds through a darker service alley filled with industrial dumpsters and wooden pallets. A man in a dark suit walks past in the opposite direction. The alley opens ahead to a street where a white SUV is parked.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner entrance with law enforcement gathering

events.description: exits alley and approaches diner entrance with colleagues
approaches sheriff and fellow agent, triggering conversation interaction

agents.ego_description: approaching sheriff and fellow FBI agent at diner entrance to join conversation

male FBI agent in matching jacket leaning against diner counter

entered.detail: roadside diner with stone facade and large windows
blue newspaper vending machine on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The agent exits the alley onto a street and approaches a diner entrance where a sheriff in brown uniform and another FBI agent are standing. The agent stops to join their conversation near a yellow newspaper machine, with the diner's stone facade and awning visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty small town, transitioning from open, rain-slicked streets to a claustrophobic alleyway before emerging at a local diner. It begins with an FBI agent walking toward an intersection past a yellow pickup truck and distant white silos under an overcast sky. As the agent turns right, the view shifts past a brick building adorned with American flags toward a waterfront promenade where workers hang a green Deer Fest banner against a backdrop of misty mountains. The scene then tightens as the camera follows the agent left into a narrow, enclosed alleyway of boarded-up storefronts and industrial dumpsters, momentarily obscuring the open landscape. Finally, the path opens back onto a street where the agent exits the shadows to join a sheriff and a colleague standing by a yellow newspaper machine at the stone entrance of a diner.
